user.title: Auckland Council Collection Schedule
user.description:
Configure Auckland Council rubbish collection information.

To find your Property ID, search for your address on the Auckland Council collection days page. The Assessment Number shown in the results is your Property ID.

data.proxy_token: Proxy Token (required if Proxy URL is set)

error.invalid_property_id: Property ID (Assessment Number) must be a number between 5 and 15 digits
error.invalid_time_format: Time must be in HH:MM format (e.g., 07:00)
error.proxy_token_required: Proxy Token is required when Proxy URL is set
error.proxy_url_required: Proxy URL is required when Proxy Token is set
error.invalid_proxy_url: Proxy URL must start with https:// or http://
